content_body: We enjoyed our solar eclipse time as Bella Vista Lodge. The view of the eclipse was perfect! The cabin is very peaceful and comfortable. While on our walk down the hill, we saw a doe and “twin fawns!” We think in doubles because we have twin grandsons! The walk back up the hill is a perfect way to get in shape to pass your stress test! We appreciate the service from housekeeping. The cabin was very clean. We enjoyed the cool air on the porch. We hated to leave! Be back soon!
title: The view of the eclipse was perfect!
